review_title: Needed this tool for a long time
description: Excellent tool for public tendering, helps our presales team in working with various public tender websites.
author: Marius H.
pros: Takes out a lot of pain from working with public tender websites as we do at Tremend in projects with European Comission. We've been building some scrapers of our own a few years ago, stopped there, but Hermix is another level.
cons: I see their UI progressing, I think they can improve it even further

review_title: Easy research of public tender in Europe
description: I'm very satisfay with availibility and speed in support. It's the perfect product for my use.
author: Heike V.
pros: Great variety of possible researches as opportunities, competitors, market overviews and many more.
cons: Summeries only available for EU tenders.

author: Brigitte N.
pros: ease of use , forecasts , data presentation, data analytics
cons: There are still some bugs . Eg : contract extensions are not taken into consideration for forecasts

review_title: A Powerful Tool for Public Sector Insights
description: My overall experience with Hermix has been excellent. Highly recommended for anyone working with public sector data!
author: Domenico V.
pros: Hermix makes it incredibly easy to navigate public sector insights, identify opportunities quickly, and make data-driven decisions. Plus, the intuitive interface and responsive support team make the experience even better!
cons: Hermix is a powerful tool but there is a learning curve when first getting familiar with all its features. Some advanced functionalities could be more intuitive, but once you get the hang of it, the platform is incredibly valuable.

review_title: Hermix is great for tapping into public money!
description: The onboarding is smooth, the UX is intuitive. You learn fast what you can do with the platform what is where and how to use it. All is straight forward. It does what it is supposed to do!
author: Mihai D.
pros: It helps find opportunities from the public sector that would otherwise be missed. What I like best is that it shows you what companies are generally winning that particular deal and the values at which those competitors are closing deals.
cons: I feel the need to also have the auction documents analyzed and summarized by the platform. Also, I feel the need to better analyze the potential match between our ideal auction type and the newly listed auctions. Many auctions fit the selection criteria we made in Hermix but are not a great fit for us.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Mihaela B.
pros: From my initial interaction, I found the platform incredibly user-friendly and the data consistently accurate. I also appreciate their forward-thinking commercial approach, which shows they're truly invested in their customers' success.
cons: The platform is continuously evolving, with new features enhancing the user experience.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Overall a very vaulable tool that is frequently updated and adjusted to users needs. I highly recomend it.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Plurarity of information. Ability to have Rfp and QA documents collected for me from the EC Funding Portal. Ability to provide short summary of an opportunity.
cons: Sometime provision of schematics of various information is a bit overwhelming. I would like to have a more clear list of the incumbents of each opportunity, i.e. to have to look even less than is now needed.

description: It's an exceptional tool that deserves to be used to its fullest for maximum results and is well tailored to the user's needs, with a user-friendly interface for everyone.
author: Ovidiu S.
pros: The freedom to be able to focus on what's really important and know that your routine is being carried out with great accuracy.
cons: This is not the case. For now, everything is well in place.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Toon K.
pros: What I liked most about Hermix is its user-friendliness and straightforward setup process. The platform is intuitive, making it easy to navigate and start using without a steep learning curve. Additionally, Hermix offers an efficient way to gather detailed insights about specific markets. This capability is invaluable as it allows us to stay informed and adapt quickly, giving us a competitive edge in our industry.
cons: Given the complexity of having multiple languages in Belgium, it sometimes takes a bit longer to retrieve the necessary details. This can be a minor inconvenience when trying to access specific local data promptly.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Great team, great support, very friendly and useful software.
cons: Did not dislike anything specific about Hermix.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Cristina Z.
pros: Using AI to help companies concretely in navigating the labyrinth of public procurement
cons: Given that Calls for Tender are often collated into one large Lot, I am not sure how small companies can benefit without a partner search function...
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Great companion to EU Tenders tracking and business intelligence
author: Ludovic D.
pros: One of the key strengths of Hermix is its comprehensive business intelligence capabilities. With its analytics capabilities, Hermix provides users with good insights into market trends, competitor activities, and potential opportunities. This helps to make informed decisions and assist with making strategic positioning.
cons: Hermix is a relatively new product that could benefit from some additional polish in terms of overall user accessibility and business intelligence

author: Amalia A.
pros: I use Hermix for dataa analysis and it has helped a lot with better understanding my competition.
cons: It is still a work in progress and so I have no dislikes, yet.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Hermix is the best tool out there for market intelligence in the Public Sector
author: Horea P.
pros: The ease of use, really valuable data crunched together to provide relevant information for our needs.
cons: Needs a bit more work on the AI-generated information.

author: Soukaïna E.
pros: Hermix is an friendly tool in a word where data can become a nightmare to analyze. A good tool but also I'm recommending it to anyone.
cons: Nothing, for me it's a really good tool.

review_title: Revolutionizing Public Sector Sales: Hermix Unleashes Modern Analytics for Business-to-Government Success
author: Dan F.
pros: Bringing modern analytics to Business-to-Government (B2G) operations sets Hermix apart, allowing businesses to leverage big data for strategic decision-making in the government sector, a domain where such tools were traditionally less accessible.
cons: The learning curve associated with adopting a specialized platform like Hermix
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Luminita V.
pros: Highly recommended for its efficiency and comprehensive features, Hermix is a must-have tool for any company thriving in the B2G market. It provides indispensable support across Sales, Bid, and Presales, ensuring alignment with our corporate goals. This analytics platform for Public Sector sales excels in user-friendliness, facilitating seamless navigation through B2G market analysis and segmentation. It furnishes abundant, pertinent data crucial for streamlining our bidding process, tracking key opportunities, evaluating partnership potential, scrutinizing competitors, and understanding governmental entities' requirements. With Hermix, we've gained a comprehensive overview of the B2G market, consolidating vital transactional insights- all conveniently accessible within a singular, efficient platform. This centralized approach markedly reduces manual workload, augmenting productivity and efficiency in managing the bidding process throughout our organization.
cons: Not applicable

review_title: A great guide unlocking a complex data landscape.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The ease with which Hermix allows me to access procurement data from high level aggregated analysis to fine grained details of single contracts surprised me. And while it provides access to a complex data landscape, the UI really helps the user know what to look for and shows the expertise and experience that have gone into creating it. Anyone experienced with public procurement data will appreciate how many steps in the workflow Hermix just seamlessly does for you.
cons: There are many ways to use Hermix to explore public procurement data that only come out while you spend time in the app, like using the extensive linkage that has been introduced into the datasets to jump between levels and gain a fuller picture. There is still a learning curve due to the sheer complexity of public procurement data. However, the help section and different materials in the Hermix App help a lot with that!

review_title: Nice almost unique tool for the International organisations market
description: Again, the first time that I see such an application allowing data analysis and do business intelligence
author: Pascal D.
pros: This is really the first time that I see such an application, with all the information inside - very powerful tool to do business intelligence, data analysis.Strong points: multi-country, all data in the same place
cons: Continue to improve the reporting part/dashboard...

review_title: Optimal for market analysis and forecast
author: Pietro S.
pros: Her mix has confirmed to be really precise and comprehensive in terms of forecasts and tenders renewals. The daily monitoring is easy to use and the overall research filters are easy to set up and tailor To needs
cons: Still too focused on EC DGs and less on other EU institutions. Also i terms of spending and economics

description: Overall, a very good experience, it is really easier to work with Hermix instead of directly retrieve information from TED
author: Pascal W.
pros: Hermix is quite easy to work with and the developper is accessible and try to do his best to satisfy our demand
cons: The level of filtering is not always as granular as requested and the export is limited to 500 lines.

description: Even if the information provided is publicly avalable, Hermix makes it very easy to retrieve critical information for Competitive Intelligence, and filter / navigate. Very good user experience.Notifications are easy to configure and provide direct access to Hermix for further analysis.Timely support in case of need.
author: Anna Maria C.
pros: Easy to use and navigate, effective presentation of information, great support.
cons: Nothing in particular, all main requirements are covered.

description: Very positive and very useful, even for day to day process and desicion making.
author: Marios S.
pros: Fast and reliable. Easy to access tools. Reporting visualization is a very helpful feature, especially for high level personnel.
cons: Data “cleaning” and organizing can be hectic but this is something done outside this tool. As a management tool on its own it’s very useful.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Monica M.
pros: I really appreciate the VALUE which brings you for Money. You dont need to work hardly for the data - it brings almost everything in your screen.
cons: I would like to test more on the apps to understand prosperly the full usage.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: It is a very good experience and it is quite useful to obtain and identify your needs
author: Davide V.
pros: The usability and its deep data analysis
cons: Dashboard must be improved a bit with some extra colors
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial
